acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Storage SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Storage sig is committed to continuously explore and build the ecology and competitiveness in the technical area of storage.. The SIG has 19 core members and maintains 87 repositories in the Storage domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Storage SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Storage SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Storage SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Storage SIG maintains 87 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Storage.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Storage SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Storage SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Zhiqiang Liu, Feilong Lin, Hongxiang Lou. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
